auth.agreeToTerms: By clicking “Create Account” you agree to the PrepIQ Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.otpVerified: OTP verified. You can now sign in.
auth.unverifiedMessage: Your account isn't verified yet. To continue, please verify your email.
auth.createAccountSubtitle: Sign up to start managing your kitchen operations with smart insights and clear actions.
auth.loginSubtitle: Please enter your details to sign in.

topNav.notificationEmptyDetail: You will see forecast, supplier, and compliance alerts here.

home.branchModeDescription: Your role is focused on branch execution. Organization-level overview is reserved for owners and operation admins.
home.checkBack: Check back in a few minutes
home.tasksWillAppear: Tasks will appear as they are assigned
home.operationalMetricsDescription: Real-time operational metrics and performance indicators for your location.
home.realTimeIntelDescription: Real-time operational intelligence and performance metrics across all branch locations.
home.telemetryDescription: Generated from cross-branch live signals and margin protection telemetry.
home.subscriptionRestricted: Some intelligence panels are unavailable for your current subscription/role.
home.strategicOverview: Strategic overview of financial performance, operational efficiency, and risk exposure across all locations.
home.ebitdaDescription: Calculated from revenue minus waste and surplus pressure
home.purchasingScoreDescription: Score factors in supplier anomalies and margin leakage patterns
home.dataWillAppear: Data will appear once operations begin
home.analyticsDescription: Generated from cross-branch operational signals, margin protection telemetry, and predictive analytics.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

branchPrompt.title:
Let's set up your
first branch.
branchPrompt.description: Every insight, every report, every shift runs through a branch. It takes two minutes.

branch.title: Create your first branch
branch.description: Define your branch profile and operating schedule. You can update this later.
branch.scheduleDescription: Toggle open days and set hours for each day.
branch.atLeastOneDay: At least one operating day is required.
branch.timesRequired: {day}: opening and closing times are required.
branch.invalidTimes: {day}: opening time must be earlier than closing time.
branch.limitReached: Branch limit reached on current plan.
branch.noOrgLinked: This account is not linked to an organization yet. Branches can only be created inside an organization.

sales.title: How do you track sales?
sales.description: PrepIQ uses historical sales to generate production forecasts. The more data you provide, the more accurate your prep quantities will be.
sales.connectPosDesc: Pull 30–90 days of sales automatically. Items are created from your POS catalog.
sales.uploadCsvDesc: Export from your current system and upload. We'll map the columns for you.
sales.skipDesc: You can add data later, but forecasts will be unavailable until then.
sales.skipButton: Skip — show me the forecast anyway

upload.title: Upload your sales data
upload.description: Export from your current system and drop it here. We'll walk you through mapping the columns.
upload.fileTooLarge: CSV file too large. Max size is 5MB.
upload.templateDownloadError: Could not download template right now. Try again.
upload.dropOrBrowse: Drop your file or click to browse
upload.scopeError: Unable to load branch access scope.
upload.mappingNote: Column names don't need to match exactly — you'll map them in the next step.
upload.posDesc: We'll pull your sales history automatically — no manual exports needed.
upload.oauthNote: OAuth — you'll be redirected to authorise
upload.apiKeyNote: API key — you'll paste a key from your dashboard

connect.squareLive: Square is the first live POS integration. Select Square to continue setup.
connect.title: Connect Square POS
connect.description: Authorize PrepIQ to read your sales data and locations. Selecting a branch opens Square in a new tab.
connect.redirectNote: You will be redirected to Square and then returned here after authorization.
connect.noBranches: No accessible branches found for integration setup.
connect.toastDesc: Provide your Toast API credentials to authorize PrepIQ to read your sales data.
connect.toastInfo: Get your API credentials from the Toast Developer Platform. You need the Client ID and Client Secret.

connected.successMsg: PrepIQ can now pull sales and location data from your Square account.
connected.failMsg: The authorization was canceled or failed. You can retry now.
connected.toastSuccessMsg: PrepIQ can now pull sales data from your Toast account. Your restaurants will be monitored automatically.

items.title: We detected {count} items.
items.description: Review your menu items below. When you confirm, PrepIQ will automatically generate ingredient recipes using our hybrid intelligence engine.
items.noBranchFoundDesc: Set up a branch first before confirming items.
items.noItemsImported: No menu items have been imported yet. Connect a POS or upload a CSV to populate items.

forecast.learning: PrepIQ is learning your kitchen patterns...
forecast.building: Building a 3-week forecast from your imported sales.
forecast.couldntGenerate: We couldn't generate setup insights yet.
forecast.connectPosOrCsv: Connect a POS or upload CSV sales data, then retry.
forecast.insightDescription: This is generated from your uploaded sales records and item behavior over the last {days} days.
forecast.noItemData: No item-level data yet. Import more sales rows to unlock performance ranking.
forecast.nextStep: Next: invite your kitchen staff, or skip to your dashboard.

staff.question: Does someone else handle your sales data?
staff.questionDesc: If a team member manages your POS or exports, they can connect it directly — no need to share credentials.
staff.inviteDataTitle: Yes — invite them to connect sales data
staff.inviteDataDesc: They'll get access to connect the POS or upload CSV exports.
staff.handleMyselfDesc: Invite your kitchen lead instead so they can log prep and waste from day one.
staff.inviteDataSubtext: They'll be able to connect your POS or upload sales exports directly.
staff.inviteChefSubtext: The forecast is ready. Invite the person who runs the kitchen so they can log production and track waste from day one.
staff.kitchenLeadDesc: Full production access — logs prep, waste, and batch output.
staff.managerDesc: Branch-level oversight — views reports and manages staff.
staff.staffDesc: Read-only prep lists — sees daily targets, no editing.

pricing.title: Choose the plan that matches your operation.
pricing.description: Start with your current plan, or upgrade now to unlock broader controls and deeper intelligence.
pricing.noPaidSub: No paid subscription yet. You are on the default Core path.
pricing.subActive: A subscription is already active for this workspace.
pricing.branchLimitsDesc: Branch limits come from the selected commercial plan.
pricing.commandCustomQuote: Command may switch to custom quote at higher location counts.
pricing.failedPlans: Failed to load pricing plans. Please refresh.
pricing.quoteAvailable: Custom quote available for larger rollouts.
pricing.confirmPlanHeader: Confirm plan, branch, and payment method.
pricing.confirmPlanDesc: Select the branch the subscription should cover. Payments are routed to Stripe for cards and PawaPay for mobile money.
pricing.paymentGatewayRedirect: You will be redirected to the payment gateway to complete the charge.
pricing.selectBranchRequired: Select a branch to attach this subscription.
pricing.billingRequired: Business name, billing email, and phone are required.

common.noBranchContextDesc: No branch context is available for this account yet. Assign this user to at least one active branch, then refresh this page.

today.title: Today's Kitchen
today.description: Review today's prep targets, adjust quantities, and start service when you're ready.
today.insight: The more you accept or override suggestions each morning, the smarter the recommendations get over time.

narrative.high: High confidence based on stable recent demand.
narrative.moderate: Moderate confidence with some expected variance.
narrative.low: Low confidence; demand is volatile or sparse.

narrative.high: Models align closely on expected demand.
narrative.moderate: Models partially agree; signals are mixed.
narrative.low: Models diverge; treat the forecast as less certain.
narrative.none: Consensus not available for this forecast.

velocity.noCheck: No live pace check yet. Tap update to compare today’s sales pace to plan.
velocity.highDemand: Selling faster than plan by {percent}. Consider a quick batch cook to protect revenue.
velocity.lowDemand: Sales are {percent} below plan. Slow prep to reduce waste.
velocity.match: Sales pace matches the plan. Keep the current prep rhythm.

network.noAction: No high-confidence network action right now.
network.reduceExposure: Reduce {item} prep exposure for the next run and monitor sell-through before close.

deepDive.insight: Every signal that shaped this forecast is visible here. Use it to make a confident prep decision.
deepDive.drivingForecastDesc: Starting from baseline, here's how each signal adjusted the final number.
deepDive.kitchenNeedsDesc: What your kitchen needs to make today's plan
deepDive.setupRecipeDesc: Set up a recipe for this item in the Inventory section to unlock ingredient forecasting.
deepDive.compareOutcomesDesc: Compare outcomes across different prep quantities.
deepDive.narrativeLow: Low confidence; demand is volatile or sparse.
deepDive.narrativeModerate: Moderate confidence with some expected variance.
deepDive.narrativeHigh: High confidence based on stable recent demand.

csvMap.foundColumns: We found {count} columns in your CSV. Map them once and push the sales into live service.
csvMap.noRowsImported: No rows were imported. Please review mapping and try again.
csvMap.columnNotInHeaders: Column "{column}" is not in the CSV headers.

saleDate.label: Date
saleDate.description: When the sale occurred (e.g., date, timestamp)

item.label: Item name or POS item id
item.description: Item title or provider item identifier from your export

revenue.label: Revenue (optional)
revenue.description: Total sale value for margin analysis.

outlook.title: Today's outlook
outlook.maintainBaseline: Maintain baseline prep. Watch {items} — they carry the highest risk today.
outlook.maintainBaselineAll: Maintain baseline prep across all items. No elevated signals.
outlook.reviewHighDemand: Plan {delta} across all items. Review high-demand items before locking plan.

risk.runOutDesc: You might run out before service ends at your current plan.
risk.wasteDesc: You may cook more than you can sell today.
risk.marginDesc: Your current plan could affect today's margin.
risk.alertDetail: Risk of {type} is {severity} right now based on your current plan input.

drivers.planVsSuggested: Your current plan is {planned} vs suggested {suggested}.
drivers.belowBaseline: At this plan, you are {quantity} below baseline, increasing stockout exposure.
drivers.highDemandPressure: Demand pressure is high for this item; consider a protective buffer.
drivers.aboveBaseline: At this plan, you are {quantity} above baseline, increasing waste exposure.
drivers.weakSellThrough: Sell-through signal is weaker than usual for this item.
drivers.marginShift: Current deviation can shift estimated margin by {amount}.

prepPlan.title: Prep Plan
prepPlan.subtitle: What to cook today
prepPlan.lockFirst: Lock the plan first, then start service.

table.stockoutWarning: If you stock out by {quantity}, you could lose {margin} margin.
table.missingPricing: Pricing data is missing. Add selling price and cost to unlock revenue and waste estimates.
table.acceptedAi: Accepted suggestion. Plan aligned with forecast.

context.noNetworkData: Nothing notable from other branches this morning.

live.csvImportCompleteDesc: Sales data is updated from your CSV. Live totals now include the imported rows.
live.csvImportDesc: Upload a POS export when live sales are offline. We will validate the file, then let you map columns before importing.
live.templateDesc: Download a clean template if you need it.
live.uploadDesc: If you upload the same file twice, PrepIQ will not double-count sales.
live.csvHeaderError: CSV file is missing a header row.
live.csvReadError: Unable to read this CSV file.
live.runoutIn: May run out in {minutes} min · Prep time {prep} min
live.allClear: All clear — no urgent issues right now.
live.demandOutpacing: Demand is outpacing stock — cook more now
live.startBatchNow: Start a batch now — runs out in {runout} min, prep takes {prep} min
live.microActionStart: Start a new batch now — you'll run out in {runout} min and prep takes {prep} min
live.microActionCook: Cook +{quantity} now — may run out in {runout} min
live.microActionOutpacing: Cook more now — demand is outpacing your current stock
live.microActionHold: Hold off on more batches — sales are slower than expected.
live.microActionWatch: Keep an eye on this — you may need +{quantity} before the rush
live.quietModeActive: Quiet mode is active. No HIGH/CRITICAL items need attention right now.
live.csvErrorHeader: CSV file is missing a header row.
live.csvErrorRead: Unable to read this CSV file.
live.csvDownloadError: Unable to download template. Please try again.
live.csvSelectError: Select a CSV file before continuing.

feedback.acceptedAi: Accepted suggestion. Plan aligned with forecast.
feedback.acceptError: Could not accept suggestion. Try again.
feedback.keepError: Could not keep chef plan. Try again.

feedback.acceptedAi: Accepted suggestion. Plan aligned with forecast.
feedback.acceptError: Could not accept suggestion. Try again.
feedback.keepError: Could not keep chef plan. Try again.

empty.noActiveItems: Morning mode is initialized, but there are no active prep items for this branch yet.

closed.title: How did today go?
closed.noWasteDistribution: No waste distribution available for this day.
closed.ofItemsChanged: of items you changed from the suggestion
closed.closeToActual: how close your plan was to actual demand
closed.ofOverridesImproved: of your overrides led to a better outcome
closed.outperformedAi: You outperformed the forecast on {count} {item} today — your instincts are being factored into future suggestions.

modals.startLiveDesc: This switches Today into live execution mode and enables rapid production logging.
modals.closeDayDesc: This finalizes today and runs the end-of-day review summary.

empty.noActiveItems: Morning mode is initialized, but there are no active prep items for this branch yet.

inventory.title: Kitchen Intelligence
inventory.description: What ingredients do you have? How much is needed? What's being wasted? What's at risk?
inventory.insight: Inventory precision compounds when ingredient planning is tied to actual usage patterns and waste is reviewed daily.
inventory.sharedDesc: Ingredients are shared across all branches. Menu items, recipes, prep batches, and waste are branch-specific.

ingredients.sharedNote: Shared across all branches. Perishable items need daily tracking.
ingredients.addFirstHint: Add your first ingredient to start building recipes.

recipes.buildRecipeNote: Click "Build Recipe" to define ingredients for each dish.
recipes.selectItemPreview: Select a menu item to preview its recipe
recipes.noItemsHint: Menu items are branch-specific. Add items to this branch to build recipes.

waste.breakdownNote: Breakdown by ingredient and by reason.
waste.noDataHint: Waste events will appear here once recorded for this branch.

recipesBuilder.description: Define which ingredients go into this dish and how much of each is needed per serving.
recipesBuilder.insight: Accurate recipes are the foundation of ingredient demand forecasting. Every line here directly drives prep quantity predictions.
recipesBuilder.startBuildingDesc: Add ingredients one by one. Each line represents one component of this dish.
recipesBuilder.howItWorksDesc: Each ingredient line represents the quantity needed to produce one serving of this dish. The waste factor adds a buffer for prep loss (e.g. trimming, cooking reduction).
recipesBuilder.forecastMultiplicationDesc: These quantities are multiplied by the daily forecast to calculate total ingredient demand.
recipesBuilder.validQtyError: Enter a valid quantity greater than 0.
recipesBuilder.allUsed: All ingredients are already in this recipe.

signals.title: Stock Signals
signals.activityNote: Most prepped ingredients and recent batch activity.
signals.noActivity: No prep activity in the last 24 hours.

production.title: Production
production.description: Live kitchen operations. Keep it fast, clear, and action-first.
production.restrictedDesc: Live kitchen operations are restricted to service roles.
production.restrictedDetail: Production command center is limited to chef, line cook, supervisor, branch manager, and ops monitoring roles.

service.missingSales: Sales feed is missing entries for some items. Verify POS sync or use manual entry.

actions.quickLogDesc: Log batches and waste in real time.

alerts.title: Stock risk alerts
alerts.noAlerts: No stock risk alerts right now.

queue.title: Prep queue
queue.description: What needs to be prepared next.

waste.title: Waste prevention signals
waste.demandSlowing: Demand slowing. Current prep may exceed demand by {quantity}.

branches.title: Branch Control
branches.description: Multi-branch performance control surface for revenue, margin, risk, and operational efficiency.
branches.insight: Executive leverage improves when branch performance is ranked by margin and risk, then reviewed against explicit targets.
branches.noBranchesFound: No branches found for current organization context.
branches.compareNote: Forecast accuracy reflects recent learning signals; data quality highlights ingestion reliability.

risk.title: Operational Risk
risk.description: Early warning signals for service disruption, waste, and supply risk.
risk.insight: See what could go wrong before service starts.

overview.demandSignalsDetail: Forecast confidence · Demand volatility · Trend velocity
overview.operationalSignalsDetail: Waste rate · Stockout history · Chef overrides

stockout.title: Stockout Risk Forecast
stockout.noRisks: No elevated stockout risks detected for the selected date.

supply.title: Supply Risk
supply.noRisks: No supply risks detected for the selected date.

volatility.title: Demand Volatility Risk
volatility.noVolatility: No high demand volatility detected for the selected date.

network.title: Network Risk Signals
network.multipleBranchesRequired: Network insights require multiple active branches.

alerts.title: Operational Alerts
alerts.noAlerts: No active operational alerts right now.

trend.title: Risk Trend
trend.noData: Not enough risk trend data yet.

financial.title: Financial Intelligence
financial.description: Operational financial performance across revenue, food cost, and waste.
financial.insight: Connect kitchen execution to margin performance in real time.

profit.title: Item Profitability
profit.noData: No profitability data available for this period.

history.title: History
history.description: Review past service days to learn what worked, where waste happened, and how prep decisions performed.
history.insight: Use the review signals to fine-tune tomorrow’s prep plan and reduce repeat waste.
history.snapshotDescription: Snapshot of how prep decisions performed.
history.selectServiceDescription: Select a service day to review performance.
history.insightText: Track how decisions map to waste and stockouts so tomorrow’s prep is tighter.

overview.title: Cross Location Dashboard
overview.description: Enterprise network intelligence with shared pattern detection, waste comparison, and forecast reliability.
overview.insight: Executives should get one view of cross-branch truth: what pattern is repeatable, where waste is growing, and what action should be standardized.
overview.noValidatedAction: No validated organization-wide transfer action yet.
overview.noNetworkLearnings: No validated network learnings available yet for this branch/day.
overview.branchDrillInDescription: Open any branch for a read-only Today snapshot with phase, plan, forecast, and money exposure.

snapshot.title: {branch} Snapshot
snapshot.description: Read-only branch operating view for owners and cross-branch leaders.
snapshot.insight: This screen is optimized for business control: phase, forecast quality, risk exposure, and expected margin signal in one view.
snapshot.noDayInitialized: No branch day initialized for this date.
snapshot.noSnapshotExists: No operational snapshot exists yet for {date}. Initialize day planning from the branch operations flow first.
snapshot.riskWeightedDesc: Risk-weighted from stockout/waste per item forecast context.
snapshot.aiAdvice: AI says focus on items with high stockout/waste score first. This is where today's money exposure concentrates.
snapshot.forecastPlanRiskTitle: Forecast, Plan, Risk, and AI Notes

salesWaste.title: Profit Intelligence
salesWaste.description: Connect sales performance with waste loss and forecasting impact.
salesWaste.insight: Understand where revenue is being captured and where margin leaks are happening.
salesWaste.tuningHint: Waste % and profitability highlight which items need forecast tuning.
salesWaste.noWasteOpportunities: No high-waste opportunities detected for this window yet.

itemDetail.title: Item Profit Detail
itemDetail.description: See how one menu item affects revenue, waste, and margin.
itemDetail.overPrepDetected: Over-prep detected. Consider slowing production to reduce waste.
itemDetail.overPrepControl: Over-prep is under control for this window.
itemDetail.underPrepRisk: Under-prep risk. Increase prep to protect revenue.
itemDetail.underPrepControl: No stockout risk detected from under-prep.
itemDetail.missingItemId: Missing item id. Go back to Sales & Waste and select an item.
itemDetail.itemNotFound: Item not found for the selected window.
itemDetail.itemNotFoundDesc: We could not find this item in the current period. Try adjusting the period or date window, or return to Sales & Waste to choose another item.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Plan, subscriptions, and payment operations across all active locations.
billing.defaultInsight: Branch-level billing is enabled. Review plan mix and upcoming renewals regularly.
billing.noTransactions: No transactions detected in this billing cycle.
billing.billingHistoryFooter: Showing last 5 invoices. Includes PDF receipts and local tax information.

chat.title: Chat
chat.insight: Structured communication improves team coordination and reduces information silos.

empty.title: Welcome to Team Chat
empty.description: Stay connected with your team through organized conversations. Select a conversation from the sidebar to start messaging, or create a new one to get started.
empty.feature1Desc: Organize conversations by topic, project, or team to keep discussions focused and searchable.
empty.feature2Desc: Send messages, share files, and get instant notifications when team members respond.
empty.select: Select a conversation from the sidebar to start messaging.
empty.tip1: Use @mentions to notify specific team members
empty.tip2: Drag and drop files to share them instantly
empty.tip3: Use tags to organize conversations by topic

area.notFoundDetail: This conversation may have been deleted or you don't have access to it.
area.startPrompt: Start the conversation by sending a message below.
area.fileSizeError: File size must be less than 10MB
area.helperText: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line. Max file size: 10MB.

create.title: Start New Conversation
create.subtitle: Create a chat thread with your team members

command.descriptionFinance: Anomaly detection and financial exposure queue prioritized by impact.
command.descriptionOps: Triage dashboard for operational risk across branches.
command.descriptionExec: Executive command queue focused on money leakage and systemic exposure.
command.insightFinance: High-impact financial anomalies are surfaced first so finance can intervene before month-end leakage compounds.
command.insightOps: Intervene where risk concentration is highest, then verify branch correction loop completion.
command.insightExec: Executive command should answer one question quickly: where are we losing money next month?
command.auditMarginMsg: Audit margin movement before month-end close.
command.reviewPurchaseCostsMsg: Review purchase costs and prep-to-sales mismatch this week.
command.investigateOverproductionMsg: Investigate item-level overproduction and end-of-day carryover.
command.wasteLevelsStableMsg: Waste levels are stable; keep monitoring outlier thresholds.
command.validateSupplierInvoiceMsg: Validate supplier invoice and contracted unit price.
command.reviewRecurringSkusMsg: Review recurring SKUs for cost movement.
command.checkWasteAccountingMsg: Check waste accounting classification before filing cycle.
command.deployInterventionMsg: Deploy branch intervention checklist and monitor next shift.
command.noBranchExceedsRiskMsg: No branch currently exceeds risk threshold.
command.adjustPrepCommandMsg: Adjust prep command and review top waste SKUs today.
command.investigateMenuMixMsg: Investigate menu mix and purchasing variance immediately.
command.triggerReplenishmentMsg: Trigger replenishment or reallocate stock between branches.
command.noLowStockAlertsMsg: No low-stock alerts in the current telemetry window.
command.compareSupplierInvoicesMsg: Compare supplier invoices to contracted pricing and demand.
command.noActivePurchaseAnomaliesMsg: No active purchase anomalies right now.
command.runShiftCoachingMsg: Run shift coaching and verify checklist completion quality.
command.recalibrateCommandMsg: Recalibrate command quantities and confirm data freshness.
command.forecastDeviationsToleranceMsg: Forecast deviations are currently within tolerance.
command.tightenPrepWindowsMsg: Tighten prep windows and reduce late-shift overproduction.
command.productionAlignedDemandMsg: Production is aligned with current demand profile.
command.leakageRecurringWasteMsg: Leakage is tied to recurring waste concentration.
command.viewBreakdownAssignCorrectiveMsg: View breakdown and assign corrective ownership.
command.lowBranchScoreMsg: Low branch score from waste/surplus pressure.
command.viewBreakdownRecoveryMsg: View breakdown and start branch recovery sprint.
command.viewBreakdownRenegotiateMsg: View breakdown and renegotiate procurement terms.
command.noActiveSupplierSpikesMsg: No active supplier spikes above threshold.
command.viewBreakdownMitigationMsg: View breakdown and prioritize multi-branch mitigation.
command.forecastMissBranchMsg: Forecast miss currently {percent}% at branch level.
command.viewBreakdownTightenGovernanceMsg: View breakdown and tighten forecast governance.

purchasing.title: Purchasing Intelligence
purchasing.description: Cost control surface for supplier performance, variance, and ordering efficiency.
purchasing.insight: Purchasing intelligence protects margin by exposing variance before it becomes recurring leakage.
purchasing.readOnlyMode: Read-only mode: branch manager visibility for purchasing trends and anomalies.
purchasing.readOnlyAccess: Read-only access. Adjustments and exports are reserved for finance and executive roles.

support.title: Support
support.description: Help center, issue tracking, and implementation assistance.
support.insight: Most onboarding blockers are integration-related and resolved within 24h.
support.highlight1: Priority support is active for production blockers.
support.highlight2: Implementation docs are versioned and up to date.
support.highlight3: Share branch ID when opening data-quality tickets.

forecastIntelligence.missingContextDesc: Select a branch and item to view the forecast intelligence drill-down.
forecastIntelligence.missingContextInsight: This page expects a branch_id and item_id.
forecastIntelligence.provideValidIds: Provide a valid `branch_id` and `item_id` in the URL.
forecastIntelligence.title: {item} Forecast Drill-Down
forecastIntelligence.description: Deep visibility into ensemble forecast logic, scenario impacts, and live demand velocity.
forecastIntelligence.insight: Use this view to validate model confidence, data quality, and chef alignment before acting.
forecastIntelligence.modelAgreementDesc: Higher agreement means lower forecast variance across models.
forecastIntelligence.qualityChecksHint: Quality checks will appear once data is available.
forecastIntelligence.velocityFeedDesc: Live demand velocity vs forecast, refreshed every {minutes} minutes while this tab is visible.
forecastIntelligence.noVelocitySnapshots: No velocity snapshots yet. The feed updates every {minutes} minutes.

staffPerformance.title: Performance Intelligence
staffPerformance.description: Team-level performance signals across production efficiency, errors, waste contribution, shift reliability, and trend direction.
staffPerformance.insight: Coaching efficiency improves when high-risk operators are identified using reliability, error rate, and waste contribution together.
staffPerformance.scopeDescription: Filter by timeframe and branch to isolate staff performance patterns before taking coaching action.
staffPerformance.viewUpdateNotice: This view updates all metrics and ranking logic for the selected scope.
staffPerformance.rankedSignalsDescription: Ranked signals per team member for coaching and staffing decisions.
staffPerformance.noStaffRecords: No active staff records found for the selected branch filter.
staffPerformance.showingRecords: Showing {count} of {total} staff records per page.
staffPerformance.compareStaffDescription: Compare two operators to see who is currently driving stronger execution quality.
staffPerformance.coachingNeedsDescription: Highest-priority interventions sorted by reliability, efficiency, and shift error risk.
staffPerformance.staffManagementDescription: Remove branch-level operators when assignments are no longer active.

settings.title: Settings
Settings
Settings
settings.description: Workspace configuration, access controls, and platform preferences.
settings.insight: Enable branch-level default context to reduce navigation friction for operators.
settings.highlight1: Profile and organization settings are healthy.
settings.highlight2: Audit logs are retained and searchable.
settings.highlight3: Role-based defaults are now ready for rollout.

branch.title: Create a branch to unlock your workspace
branch.description: PrepIQ needs a branch before we can load production, sales, waste, and forecasting data. After creating a branch, connect your POS or upload CSV sales to start intelligence.
branch.step1Desc: Add branch name, location, and timezone.
branch.step2Desc: Connect POS or upload CSV sales for forecasting.

sales.title: Connect POS or upload CSV to start intelligence
sales.description: You already have a branch. Next, add a sales source so PrepIQ can generate production forecasts, waste insights, and margin protection signals.
sales.step2Desc: Import sales with mapping profiles for repeat uploads.
sales.step3Desc: Once sales arrive, dashboards and command views activate.
